name: HMCS ML 107 (ML 107)
events: 11 Nov 1944 HMS Cleopatra (Capt. B.I. Robertshaw, RN) conducted plotting exercises with the motor launches HMCS ML 105 (T/Lt W.P.T. McGhee, RCNVR) and HMCS ML 107 (T/Lt H.P.R. Brown, RCNVR). These were followed by gunnery exercises. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
